summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Portuguese Maritime Police service management system. All core functionalities working correctly including dashboard, services table, Navios/Policiamentos forms, CRUD operations, PDF generation, and search/filtering.
passed_tests: All 12 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Dashboard loads with stats cards, monthly chart, and recent services table
Services table displays data with functional filters and search
Navios form creation and edit workflows
Policiamentos form creation and edit workflows
Filter by service type and command post works
Database integration with existing OCEANXPERIENCE service
